title: zabelia shikokiana
intro: Zabelia shikokiana, also known as Japanese Boxwood or Kuro-Gaki, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine in East Asia, particularly in China and Japan, for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Zabelia shikokiana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
